-PORTVERSION=	1.05
+PORTVERSION=	2.00

 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	gslin@gslin.org

 COMMENT=	Helper functions for PBM/PGM/PPM image file formats
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
 MAN3=		Image::PBMlib.3
